title: No Fighting! :P
content:
Okay Okay .. no fighting about the fonts.  **Georgia @ 8**  and  **Tahoma @ 8**  (for Thai) are my choices. Alternate versions  _might_  be available through a  "Style Switcher":http://www.alistapart.com/stories/alternate/  script (that's from  "A List Apart":http://www.alistapart.com  .. nice site.)

Nothing much today .. I need to go out, get some air. Been in the cave for a whole week already. Almost forgot what the 'sun light' looks like. :P

Enjoy your weekends!
